Silent Hill (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $46,982,632Details
International Box Office $47,721,595
Worldwide Box Office $94,704,227
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,677,800
Total $23,677,800
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,152,598 (42.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,926 opening theaters/2,932 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $85,788,135

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 21st, 2006 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: August 22nd, 2006 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong horror violence and gore, disturbing images, and some language.
Running Time: 125 minutes
Franchise: Silent Hill
Plot point: Demons, Monster
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: Japan, France, United States
